client_da_notes: Estimated DA based on domain age (est. 1973 business, site likely 10+ years old), local link signals from builder partnerships and supplier pages. McKinnon should be competitive with most local HVAC competitors.

competitors.name: Dale Air
strengths: Established Bayside brand with strong local authority
Ranks for high-volume ducted heating Melbourne terms
Active Google Business Profile with 200+ reviews
weaknesses: Limited content depth on split system and multi-head pages
No dedicated suburb landing pages beyond 3-4 core areas
Weak on informational/comparison content — no blog or FAQ structure
competitors.gap_opportunity: Dale Air has no meaningful content for split systems or Mornington Peninsula suburbs — direct opportunity for McKinnon

competitors.name: Surrey Air
strengths: Ranks for 'air conditioning installation melbourne' in top 5
weaknesses: Geographic focus skews east — weak coverage of inner Bayside (Brighton, St Kilda, Port Melbourne)
Split system page thin — no suburb targeting
No hydronic or evaporative content
competitors.gap_opportunity: Surrey Air concedes the entire inner Bayside strip — McKinnon's home territory. Direct geographic gap.

competitors.name: 2 Masters Heating and Cooling
strengths: Competitive on split system installation terms
weaknesses: Geographic focus entirely north-west of Melbourne — no Bayside or Peninsula presence
Low DA — outranked by stronger players on competitive terms
Minimal location page strategy
competitors.gap_opportunity: Virtually no overlap in target geography — confirms McKinnon has clear territory on the south/Bayside corridor

competitors.name: Bayair
strengths: Direct geographic competitor — same Bayside territory
Ranks for Peninsula-specific terms (Frankston, Mornington, Rosebud)
weaknesses: Lower DA than Dale Air — outranked on competitive Melbourne-wide terms
Split system content weak relative to ducted heating focus
Limited structured content — basic service pages, no comparison content
Reviews average 4.2/5 vs McKinnon 4.7/5 — quality gap visible in SERP snippets
competitors.gap_opportunity: Bayair is the closest direct competitor but has structural content gaps McKinnon can exploit with structured suburb pages and comparison content

competitors.name: SK AIR
strengths: Strong inner-city focus — St Kilda, South Melbourne, Port Melbourne
weaknesses: Low DA — limited organic visibility beyond very local terms
No ducted heating content — purely AC/cooling focused
No suburb pages strategy — single service area page
Heating entirely absent — major gap
competitors.gap_opportunity: SK AIR doesn't compete on heating at all — McKinnon can dominate heating + cooling combo for inner Bayside with no direct competitor

competitors.name: Coldflow
weaknesses: Commercial-heavy — residential page depth is limited
No ducted heating — purely cooling focused
Geographic focus outer south-east — limited inner Bayside presence
Split system pages lack suburb targeting
competitors.gap_opportunity: Coldflow has no heating content — McKinnon's full-service (heating + cooling) offering is a direct competitive advantage on all combined-intent searches

competitor_keyword_gaps.description: Keywords where competitors rank but McKinnon currently does not, representing direct opportunities

gaps.competitor_ranking: No strong local competitor in top 3
No HVAC competitors in top 5 — dominated by product retailers
McKinnon's home suburb — no strong competitor
